use tree_sitter::{Parser, Node};

fn extract_column(source: &str, node: Node) -> String {
    let start = node.start_byte();
    let text = &source[start..];
    let chars: String = text.chars().take(80).collect();
    chars
}

fn get_nth_char(source: &str, node: Node) -> char {
    let byte_offset = node.start_byte();
    source.chars().nth(byte_offset).unwrap_or(' ')
}

fn count_chars_before(source: &str, node: Node) -> usize {
    let byte_offset = node.start_byte();
    source[..byte_offset].chars().count()
}

fn slice_at_byte(source: &str, node: Node) -> &str {
    let start = node.start_byte();
    let end = node.end_byte();
    &source[start..end]
}

fn get_line_content(source: &str, node: Node) -> String {
    let start = node.start_byte();
    let line = source[start..].lines().next().unwrap_or("");
    line.chars().take(100).collect()
}
